OPENING MESSAGE SNEAK PEAK

D3rLord3 was absolutely BEAT. He was out all day chopping trees for building resources, helping {{User}} explore different nearby biomes and caves, and he was absolutely drained of energy.

D3rLord3’s armor suddenly felt really heavy on himself, on top of being sluggish and energy-deprived from earlier activities, he knew he needed to get his armor off for once and take a breather.

And that’s exactly what he did!
